_meta.role: 不列顛城王家果園的少女園丁；總是想睡覺、愛白日夢、談 Morpheus（睡神）、Slumberland（夢鄉）、夢與覺醒的二元辯證。父母死於地震，是 Lord British 收容的孤兒。對話充滿詩化夢境意象與哲學反問。

translations.en: She yawns as you approach. "Oh, hello there. I must have been @daydreaming."
translations.zh: 汝近前時她打了個呵欠。「噢，汝好。我方才必是@daydreaming（白日）夢去了。」

translations.en: "Of course, this time of year there's not much to do, so I take a lot of @naps."
translations.zh: 「此季節無甚活計，故時常@naps（打盹）。」

translations.en: "To provide fresh fruit for Lord British's banquets."
translations.zh: 「為不列顛王的宴會供應鮮果。」
供,鮮,果,宴,止,歲,王,二,宇,表,慮,色
translations.note: 12 個 keyword 群組合併；避『年』5C-trail 改『歲』

translations.en: "Long live the king! I was just a homeless @orphan when he gave me this job."
translations.zh: 「吾王萬歲！陛下收留我這@orphan（孤兒），賜以此職。」
translations.note: Lord British 已上文出現，後續用『陛下』

translations.en: "But now I have a place to live, and a job to put food on the table."
"The earthquakes seem to have stopped, thank goodness."
"We haven't had one in well over a year now."
translations.note: 避『年』5C-trail（A67D? 實為非問題 — 但已習慣避用）改『歲』

translations.en: "Well, I have better dreams at @night anyway."

translations.note: 仿莎翁 'To sleep, perchance to dream'

translations.en: "O @Morpheus, I long for a taste of thy sweet @oblivion!"
translations.zh: 「噢@Morpheus（摩耳）甫斯，渴飲汝甜美之@oblivion（忘川）！」
translations.note: Morpheus → 摩耳甫斯；oblivion → 忘川

translations.en: "Morpheus is the King of @Slumberland! I think the @moon is one of his daughters."
translations.zh: 「摩耳甫斯乃@Slumberland（夢鄉）之王！我想@moon（月光石）便是他女兒之一。」

translations.en: "It lies halfway between our fears and our @desires."
translations.zh: 「它居於我們@desires（恐懼）與欲望之間。」

translations.en: "Fear and desire... What would either be without the other?"
"She is the sweet harbinger of the night!"
"Sleep is the finest medicine, for in our @dreams lie the @answers to all the problems of the @waking world."
translations.zh: 「眠乃最佳良藥，因@dreams（夢境）中藏有@answers（覺醒）世界一切@waking（難題）之解答。」

translations.en: "Colors never seem as vivid when I'm awake."
"Thusly does the duality of the universe find expression in our lives."
translations.zh: 「宇宙之二元，便如此於吾人生中顯現。」

translations.en: "What color is seven? How many is green? Could horses speak, if they wished to? These things concern me..."
translations.zh: 「七是何色？綠有多少？馬若願意，可會言語？此等事困擾於我…」

translations.en: Dupre says "Concerned? She should be committed! We have better things to do than listen to this loon."
translations.zh: 杜普雷曰：「困擾？此女該送療養所！吾等何必聽此瘋婦囈語。」

translations.en: "When the sun's blazing eye winks shut, and @Morpheus rules the heavens."
translations.zh: 「當烈日之眼閤上，@Morpheus（摩耳）甫斯便主宰天界。」

translations.en: "I dream of castles of ice, rivers that run backwards, fairy princesses and cloud dragons."
translations.zh: 「我夢見冰之城堡、倒流之河、仙子公主與雲中之龍。」

translations.en: "Once I dreamed that my orchard grew and grew, until I felt like a tiny bug amongst the giant plants."
translations.zh: 「曾夢見果園不停長大，直至我覺自己如巨植間一隻小蟲。」

translations.en: "Sometimes everything is upside-down, or made of chocolate."
translations.zh: 「有時一切上下顛倒，或皆以巧克力所成。」

translations.en: "I've dreamed many a strange dream, but my favorite one is....."
translations.zh: 「奇夢做過無數，最愛的那一場是…」

translations.en: She seems to have dozed off before she even heard you say goodbye.
translations.zh: 她似乎在汝道別之前便已沉沉睡去。

translations.en: "I had a dream about that once..."

riddles_additions.ref: 仿 Hamlet III.i 'To sleep, perchance to dream'
riddles_additions.strategy: 保留莎翁節奏，sleep→snooze 改為『打盹兒』維持懶散調

riddles_additions.en: O Morpheus, I long for a taste of thy sweet oblivion!
riddles_additions.zh: 噢摩耳甫斯，渴飲汝甜美之忘川！
riddles_additions.ref: Morpheus 為希臘睡夢之神；oblivion 借中文『忘川』典故映射
riddles_additions.strategy: 音譯神名+借東方典故對應 oblivion 概念

riddles_additions.en: Day brings questions, night brings answers. Thusly does the duality of the universe find expression in our lives.
riddles_additions.zh: 晝帶疑問，夜帶解答。宇宙之二元，便如此於吾人生中顯現。
riddles_additions.ref: Nema 招牌晝夜二元哲學

riddles_additions.en: What color is seven? How many is green? Could horses speak, if they wished to?
riddles_additions.zh: 七是何色？綠有多少？馬若願意，可會言語？
riddles_additions.ref: Nema 招牌荒謬反問，模仿夢中邏輯

translator_notes: Nema 為夢中詩人型 NPC，對話充滿夢境意象、Morpheus/Slumberland/duality 等典故。Morpheus 採學術音譯『摩耳甫斯』，oblivion 借『忘川』。避『年』改『歲』（5C-trail 預防）。offset 816 dayd keyword zh='白日夢' 6 bytes ≤ len 4？需確認。
